weather_layers.policy: Keep conservative. Snowstorm buildup must stay blocked outside cold biomes.
Season color is welcome, blanket snow/ice generation stays off.
Warm biome melt and winter-only accumulation must remain on.

weather_layers.role: night sky atmosphere, strongest in Frostmarch and cold outer regions
weather_layers.policy: Visual layer only; do not use it as proof of cold climate correctness.
Use for danger mood but do not let event pressure replace Atlas progression.

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: temperate rain and fair skies; storms should feel rare and readable
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: visible seasonal color shifts without heavy snow or ice conversion

snow_ice_permission.reason: starter region must remain temperate and beginner-friendly

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: snow, blizzards, frozen fog, and hard winter visibility where safe
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: winter may be visually strong; snow and ice are region-appropriate

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: dry, hot, dusty, storm-scarred; rain should be uncommon and snow forbidden
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: season color can shift plants, but winter must not whiten the region

snow_ice_permission.reason: warm/arid region; previous warm snow bug must not return

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: wet, lush, stormy, coastal; lightning and heavy rain fit better than snow
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: wet seasons can feel strong; foliage shifts should stay lush

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: windy, mountainous, exposed; rain and fog fit, broad snow does not
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: cool seasonal color is fine; Atlas removed snow-risk west biomes for a reason

snow_ice_permission.reason: west is highland/mountain-first, not Frostmarch snow identity

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: cold coastal storms, sleet-like mood, frozen crossings
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: snow is allowed where the selected biome data is cold

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: cold mountain weather; snow allowed where biome data supports it
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: winter identity can be visible but should still read mountainous

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: hot coastal storms and monsoon mood; no snow
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: wet/dry seasonal contrast, no winter whitening

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: hot, arid, storm-carved; no snow or cold-season buildup
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: dry winter colors only; no snow accumulation

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: dangerous, oppressive, region-by-biome; do not blanket snow warm samples
region_weather_policy.season_behavior: season behavior must follow actual biome climate; corruption should not become random snow

snow_ice_permission.reason: outer pool includes both cold and hot biomes

region_weather_policy.weather_mood: dimension atmosphere only; no Overworld storm control
dimension atmosphere only; no Overworld storm control
